allow: Bash(sed -i 's/i < MAX_ZONES/i < ZONE_COUNT/g' src/effects/welcome.c src/effects/rear_alert.c src/effects/ambient.c)
Bash(sed -i 's/点名式: 遍历全部 zone，只处理照脚灯层级的/点名式: 明确知道要操作哪些 zone，逐个查 mask/' src/effects/footwell_pulse.c)
Bash(sed -i 's/zone_fill\(out, Z_LF_FOOT,  255, 140, 0, br\)/zone_fill\(out, Z_LF_FOOT,  255, 140, 0, br, 0\)/' src/effects/footwell_pulse.c)
Bash(sed -i 's/zone_fill\(out, Z_LR_FOOT, 255, 140, 0, br\)/zone_fill\(out, Z_LR_FOOT, 255, 140, 0, br, 0\)/' src/effects/footwell_pulse.c)
Bash(sed -i 's/zone_fill\(out, Z_RF_FOOT, 255, 140, 0, br\)/zone_fill\(out, Z_RF_FOOT, 255, 140, 0, br, 0\)/' src/effects/footwell_pulse.c)
Bash(sed -i 's/zone_fill\(out, Z_RR_FOOT, 255, 140, 0, br\)/zone_fill\(out, Z_RR_FOOT, 255, 140, 0, br, 0\)/' src/effects/footwell_pulse.c)

Bash(sed -i 's/EVT_RAW[ ]*\\/\\/ 原始 CAN 帧透传/EVT_ALCTRL,       \\/\\/ BO_719 主控制帧 \(VIU_ALCtrl\)\\n    EVT_MUSIC_FOLLOW,\\/\\/ BO_489-493 音乐随动区域\\n    EVT_MUSIC_TWEETER,\\/\\/ BO_494 高音扬声器散光\\n    EVT_RAW         \\/\\/ 原始 CAN 帧透传/' include/types.h)

Bash(printf '#include <stdio.h>\\n#include <stdlib.h>\\n#include <signal.h>\\n#include "hal.h"\\n#include "types.h"\\n#include "led_map.h"\\n#include "manager/effect_manager.h"\\n#include "can/parser.h"\\n#include "render/renderer.h"\\n#include "commands/processor.h"\\n#include "effects/rear_alert.h"\\n#include "effects/welcome.h"\\n#include "effects/ambient.h"\\n#include "effects/running_light.h"\\n#include "effects/footwell_pulse.h"\\n\\nstatic volatile int running = 1;\\nstatic void on_sigint\(int _\) { \(void\)_; running = 0; }\\n\\nint main\(void\) {\\n    signal\(SIGINT, on_sigint\);\\n\\n    hal_init\(\);\\n    can_parser_init\(\);\\n    commands_init\(\);\\n    em_init\(\);\\n\\n    em_register_factory\("rear_alert",       rear_alert_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("welcome",          welcome_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("running_light_2",  running_light_2_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("running_light_1",  running_light_1_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("ambient",          ambient_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("footwell_pulse",   footwell_pulse_factory\);\\n\\n    printf\("\\\\033[2J\\\\033[H"\);\\n    printf\("ALC Effect Scheduler -- starting 10ms loop \(Ctrl+C to stop\)\\\\n"\);\\n    hal_delay_ms\(500\);\\n\\n    while \(running\) {\\n        uint32_t now = hal_millis\(\);\\n\\n        uint8_t frame[64];\\n        while \(hal_can_read\(frame\)\)\\n            can_handle_frame\(frame\);\\n\\n        commands_tick\(now\);\\n\\n        {\\n            EffectCommand cmd;\\n            while \(command_queue_pop\(&cmd\)\)\\n                em_process_command\(&cmd\);\\n        }\\n\\n        LedOutput out;\\n        em_update_all\(now, &out\);\\n        commit_led_output\(&out\);\\n\\n        uint32_t elapsed = hal_millis\(\) - now;\\n        if \(elapsed < 10\)\\n            hal_delay_ms\(10 - elapsed\);\\n    }\\n\\n    printf\("\\\\033[2J\\\\033[H"\);\\n    em_shutdown\(\);\\n    printf\("ALC Effect Scheduler -- stopped.\\\\n"\);\\n    return 0;\\n}\\n')
Bash(sed -i 's/starting \(Ctrl+C to stop\)/starting 10ms \(Ctrl+C to stop\)\\\\\\n/' src/main.c)
Bash(sed -i 's/case 1:  return "theme_custom";/case 0:  return "theme_off";\\n    case 1:  return "theme_custom";/' src/commands/processor.c)

Bash(sed -i 's|em_register_factory\("footwell_pulse",   footwell_pulse_factory\);|em_register_factory\("footwell_pulse",   footwell_pulse_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("theme_off",        theme_off_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("theme_custom",     theme_custom_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("theme_effect1",    theme_effect1_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("theme_effect2",    theme_effect2_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("theme_effect3",    theme_effect3_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("theme_effect4",    theme_effect4_factory\);\\n    em_register_factory\("theme_music",      theme_music_factory\);|' src/main.c)
Bash(sed -i 's/uint8_t fl_rear, fr_rear, rl_rear, rr_rear;/uint8_t fl_rear, fr_rear, rl_rear, rr_rear, tweeter;/' src/commands/processor.c)
Bash(sed -i 's|// TODO: 每个区域的 zone 列表 \(填入实际 zone 枚举值\)|// 每个区域的 zone 列表 \(TODO: 填入实际 zone 枚举值\)\\n// 6 个列表的并集构成 video_ambient 的 zone mask|' src/effects/video_ambient.c)

Bash(sed -i 's|Effect \\*video_ambient_factory\(void\) {\\n    // zone mask: 所有受 VideoAmbLi 控制的 zone \(TODO: 精确化\)\\n    ZoneMask mask = zm_group_all_zones\(\);|Effect *video_ambient_factory\(void\) {\\n    ZoneMask mask; zm_clear\(\\&mask\);\\n    // 将 6 个区域列表的并集作为 zone mask\\n    for \(int i = 0; i < \(int\)VA_LEN\(g_video_fl_zones\); i++\) zm_set\(\\&mask, g_video_fl_zones[i]\);\\n    for \(int i = 0; i < \(int\)VA_LEN\(g_video_fr_zones\); i++\) zm_set\(\\&mask, g_video_fr_zones[i]\);\\n    for \(int i = 0; i < \(int\)VA_LEN\(g_video_ml_zones\); i++\) zm_set\(\\&mask, g_video_ml_zones[i]\);\\n    for \(int i = 0; i < \(int\)VA_LEN\(g_video_mr_zones\); i++\) zm_set\(\\&mask, g_video_mr_zones[i]\);\\n    for \(int i = 0; i < \(int\)VA_LEN\(g_video_rl_zones\); i++\) zm_set\(\\&mask, g_video_rl_zones[i]\);\\n    for \(int i = 0; i < \(int\)VA_LEN\(g_video_rr_zones\); i++\) zm_set\(\\&mask, g_video_rr_zones[i]\);|' src/effects/video_ambient.c)
